{/* AUTO-SYNCED from the upstream README. Edit the source repo, not this file. */}


This repository houses workflows, analytics, and extension manifests required for the Marketing Operations solution bundle.

Structure:
- `workflows/` – YAML definitions for campaign lifecycle, content calendar, and approvals.
- `analytics/` – Dashboard configuration (JSON/YAML) for ROI, spend pacing, lead funnel.
- `extensions/` – Extension manifests referencing automation connectors (e.g., Make.com, CRM sync).
- `docs/` – Bundle-specific documentation (playbooks, onboarding checklists).

Status: Draft skeleton created 2025-11-05.
